name: paperwik
description: Paperwik marketplace — single-plugin marketplace publishing the Paperwik agent-maintained Obsidian knowledge base plugin (deep research, ZSC routing, tooling-enforced contracts).

plugins.name: pw
plugins.description: Agent-maintained Obsidian knowledge base for non-technical Windows users. The LLM reads your sources, writes summary pages, maintains cross-references, and weaves a persistent wiki that compounds over time. Includes a 4-phase in-session deep-research skill (PLANNER → SEARCHER → parallel SECTION WRITERS → EDITOR; drops 3-5K-word cited syntheses into Inbox), local zero-shot classification (DeBERTa-v3 ONNX) for project routing + source-type tagging with NO Anthropic API dependency, indexer pre-flight gates that refuse to ship malformed documents, compaction-resilient memory hooks, silent Git autosave, and a synthetic test harness that catches contract drift before real research runs. Users never touch a terminal command beyond 'ingest this' or 'research X thoroughly'.
